Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter investigates a theft turned murder when a robbery victim hires a detective to retrieve stolen jewels.
Video.title: Death Machine

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: When a dead girl disappears from Hunter's living room, he and McCall follow a trail of intrigue and murder.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.
Video.title: Rich Girl

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: Rachel kidnaps a young boy whom she suspects witnessed a murder.
Video.title: The Lady Vanishes

Video.summary: After shooting a dangerous armed robber, a cop is accused of murdering an unarmed man.
Video.title: Ghost

Video.summary: Tony helps a friend cope with his wife's death during a burglary case, while David loses his gift money.
Video.title: A Christmas Story

Video.summary: Tony's former partner seeks revenge for a long jail sentence.
Video.title: Revenge

Video.summary: Wrongly suspended from the force for beating a suspect, Hunter pursues the gangster who had him discredited.
Video.title: The Setup

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's investigation into adultery and homicide pits them against a group of Russian spies.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a student terror group in the car bombing of a Middle-Eastern consulate member.
Video.title: 62 Hrs. Of Terror

Video.summary: Tony sets out to prove a mental patient isn't guilty of murder.
Video.title: Head Case

Video.summary: Tony helps a distraught father locate the son he lost to a witness relocation program.
Video.title: Hidden

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: A teenager's death leads Hunter and McCall to a Fagin who commands a group of barrio boys to commit crimes.
Video.title: Fagin 1986

Video.summary: An seemingly accidental death exposes a neighbor's bigamy; David resorts to theft to impress some friends.
Video.title: The Johnny Club

Video.summary: Reno gets kidnapped by an insane woman who wants him to marry her sister.
Video.title: The Dollhouse

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby get involved with the mafia in their search for evidence exonerating Reno.
Video.title: Hog Calls

Video.summary: Reno sees what the world would be like had he died in 1992 instead of his fiancee. JOHNNY CASH guest stars.
Video.title: The Road Not Taken

Video.summary: Bobby's fearsome adversary is released from prison and Dutch plots to use the convict to eliminate Reno. A woman wants to join the bounty-hunting team.
Video.title: No Balls And Two Strikes

Video.summary: Reno meets his counterpart: a female motorcycle-riding fugitive who is wanted by the police. LINDA BLAIR guest stars.
Video.title: Self Defense
